_status: PROPOSED DRAFT - owner must review, edit, ratify (date + sign-off), then load; loads fail closed while status is not RATIFIED. Every template_id below is one the code actually references by name - this is not a hypothetical list.

entries.purpose: Notify a buyer of a new listing match to their stated criteria
entries.body: Hi {{first_name}}, a new listing just matched your search criteria. Want me to send details?

entries.purpose: Confirm a scheduled showing
entries.body: Your showing is confirmed for {{date}} at {{time}}. Reply here if anything changes.

entries.purpose: A confirmed showing was displaced by a protected-deadline booking (added 2026-07-17, missed in the original draft compilation since the underlying fix landed after this file was last generated)
entries.body: Your showing originally scheduled for {{original_time}} needs to be rescheduled due to a scheduling conflict. A team member will follow up shortly with new times.

entries.purpose: Neutral, no-reproach request for feedback after a showing
entries.body: Thanks for viewing the property. Any feedback you can share would be appreciated.

entries.purpose: Request a specific document during a transaction
entries.body: We still need your {{doc_type}} to keep things moving. Could you send it over when you get a chance?

entries.purpose: Second/third follow-up on an outstanding document request
entries.body: Following up on the {{doc_type}} we requested - just checking if you need anything from us to get it over.

entries.purpose: The document received didn't open correctly - request a resend
entries.body: The {{doc_type}} you sent didn't open on our end - could you resend it, maybe as a PDF?

entries.purpose: The wrong document type was received - request the correct one
entries.body: Thanks for sending that over - looks like we actually need a {{requested}} rather than a {{received}}. Could you send the right one when you get a chance?

entries.purpose: Notify a buyer their pre-approval has expired mid-search
entries.body: Just a heads up - your pre-approval letter has expired. New matches will keep coming, but let's get an updated letter on file when you can.

entries.purpose: Ask a buyer to confirm a search-criteria change rather than silently updating it
entries.body: You mentioned "{{verbatim}}" - want me to update your search criteria to reflect that, or was that just about this one property?

entries.purpose: Acknowledge a pricing/strategy question and hand off to the human agent - never answers the question itself
entries.body: Great question - that's exactly the kind of thing your agent should weigh in on directly. They'll follow up with you shortly.

entries.purpose: Acknowledge an angry/upset client without making any promises or getting defensive
entries.body: I hear you, and I'm sorry this hasn't gone the way you expected. I'm flagging this for your agent right now so they can follow up personally.

entries.purpose: Confirm a client's request to switch contact channel
entries.body: Got it - we'll reach you by {{new_channel}} from here on out.

entries.purpose: Confirm a mid-capture request to stop all contact (Agent 01 tuple 15, added 2026-07-17 - this agent had no route to send this confirmation at all before). Also reused by Agent 03 tuple 6 (explicit STOP during an active nurture sequence) - same underlying confirmation, same wording.
entries.body: Understood - we won't contact you again. If that changes, you're welcome to reach back out any time.

entries.purpose: Confirm a frequency complaint during an active nurture sequence (Agent 03 tuple 2, added 2026-07-17 - cadence was reduced silently before, with nothing ever telling the client)
entries.body: Got it - we'll cut back on how often we reach out. You'll still hear from us, just less frequently.

entries.purpose: Client referenced a conversation not on file - ask for details rather than pretend to recall it
entries.body: I want to make sure I follow up on the right thing - could you remind me a bit more about what was discussed?

entries.purpose: Deliver a sourced neighborhood/market data package - facts only, never characterized
entries.body: Here's this week's market snapshot for your area: {{package}}

entries.purpose: Deliver sourced neighborhood data for a buyer's area of interest
entries.body: Here's the neighborhood data you asked about: {{package}}

entries.purpose: State a refinance rate fact - never advice, source always attached
entries.body: Rates dropped to {{rate}}% per {{source}}. Wanted you to have the current number.

entries.purpose: Periodic referral ask - never mentions any incentive or reward
entries.body: Hope you're settling in well! If you know anyone thinking about buying or selling, I'd love an introduction.

entries.purpose: Post-close review/testimonial request
entries.body: It was a pleasure helping you with your home. If you have a minute, a review would mean a lot: {{review_link}}

entries.purpose: Scheduled nurture-sequence content, subject to frequency cap and compliance review
entries.body: {{content}}

entries.purpose: Acknowledge an inbound social question that may relate to an existing matter - never confirms client status
entries.body: Thanks for reaching out - a team member will follow up with you directly.

entries.purpose: Offer the next legally-permissible showing/contact slot
entries.body: The next available time that works on our end is {{slot_time}} - does that work for you?

entries.purpose: Birthday greeting - dynamic template ({{event_type}}_greeting), list is the only authority
entries.body: Happy birthday, {{first_name}}! Hope you have a great one.

entries.purpose: Home purchase anniversary greeting - suppressed if a distress event is on file
entries.body: Happy home anniversary, {{first_name}}! Hard to believe it's been a year (or more) since you moved in.

entries.purpose: Holiday greeting - list is the only authority for inclusion
entries.body: Wishing you and your family a wonderful {{holiday_name}}!

entries.purpose: 30-day post-close check-in
entries.body: Hi {{first_name}}, just checking in a month after closing - how's everything going with the new place?

entries.purpose: 90-day post-close check-in
entries.body: Hi {{first_name}}, hope the first few months in your new home have been great. Let me know if you need anything.

entries.purpose: 1-year post-close check-in
entries.body: Hi {{first_name}}, can't believe it's been a year already! Hope you're loving the home.
